narration: Hemoglobin is the protein in red blood cells transporting oxygen. But did you know iron is its secret weapon?
visual_description: Context visual: Hemoglobin is the protein in red blood cells transporting oxygen. But did you know iron is its secret weapon?
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Hemoglobin is the protein in red blood cells transporting oxygen. But did you know iron is its secret weapon?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Hemoglobin is the protein in red blood cells transporting oxygen. But did you know iron is its secret weapon?

narration: Without iron, hemoglobin can't bind oxygen. Low iron means low oxygen in your body's cells.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Without iron, hemoglobin can't bind oxygen. Low iron means low oxygen in your body's cells.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Without iron, hemoglobin can't bind oxygen. Low iron means low oxygen in your body's cells.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Without iron, hemoglobin can't bind oxygen. Low iron means low oxygen in your body's cells.

narration: Studies show iron deficiency can lead to fatigue, weakness, and even cognitive issues. Crazy, right?
visual_description: Evidence visual: Studies show iron deficiency can lead to fatigue, weakness, and even cognitive issues. Crazy, right?

narration: So, ensuring adequate iron intake is vital for your health. What’s your iron source?
